fish_list.name: Assorted Guppy 3cm
fish_list.description: The Assorted Guppy 3cm is a vibrant and eye-catching addition to any aquarium. With a variety of colors from the rainbow, these guppies are sure to add a pop of color to your underwater world. A perfect choice for beginners or experienced fish owners alike.
fish_list.living_requirements: Maintain clean tank and equipment; Fresh, dechlorinated water; Ensure compatibility with other tank mates.

fish_list.name: Cardinal Tetra
fish_list.description: Cardinal Tetras are popular schooling fish known for their striking neon red and blue colors, making them a centerpiece for many community aquariums.
fish_list.living_requirements: Maintain clean tank and equipment; Fresh, dechlorinated water; Ensure compatibility with other tank mates.

fish_list.name: Luminous colour Tetra 3cm
fish_list.colour: Luminous (Red, Green, Blue, Purple, Yellow, Assorted)
fish_list.description: Enhance your tank with Luminous Tetra's dazzling disco feature. Watch as these 3cm tetras light up your aquarium with their vibrant colors and playful movements, transforming your tank into a mesmerizing underwater dance party.
fish_list.living_requirements: Maintain clean tank and equipment; Fresh, dechlorinated water; Ensure compatibility with other tank mates.

fish_list.name: Rosy Tetra 3cm
fish_list.description: Add a touch of vibrant color to your tank with Rosy tetra. These small fish bring a burst of life to any aquatic environment with their bright hues and active nature.
fish_list.living_requirements: Maintain clean tank and equipment; Fresh, dechlorinated water; Ensure compatibility with other tank mates.

fish_list.name: Longfin Panda Corydoras (3cm)
fish_list.colour: White/Light body with black panda-like markings
fish_list.description: Featuring unique long fins, the Longfin Panda Corydoras is a perfect addition to any aquarium. They are active bottom-dwellers that help keep the tank clean by eating leftover food and debris.
fish_list.living_requirements: Maintain clean tank and equipment; Fresh, dechlorinated water; Ensure compatibility with other tank mates.
